title: pentacalia elatoides
intro: Pentacalia elatoides, also known as the Ecuadorian mountain pentacalia, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ecuadorian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pentacalia elatoides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Pentacalia elatoides typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using them in ointments and salves to topical application.
